mapper.sql: select c.id, c.class_id, cls.class_name, c.course_id, crs.course_name, c.teacher_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, u.user_name) as teacher_name, c.term_id, t.term_name, c.business_type, c.teaching_class_code, c.credits, c.course_category, c.open_dept_id, d.dept_name as open_dept_name, c.major, c.campus_name, c.assessment_type, c.teaching_language, c.prerequisite_course, c.task_type, c.required_flag, c.selection_option_name, c.selection_group_code, c.selection_group_name, c.selection_group_limit, c.course_level_requirement, c.total_hours, c.required_weeks, c.weekly_hours, c.arranged_hours, c.student_limit, (select count(1) from sc_course_student cs where cs.class_course_id = c.id and cs.status = '0') as actual_student_count, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from sc_class_course c left join sc_class cls on cls.class_id = c.class_id left join sc_course crs on crs.course_id = c.course_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.teacher_id left join sc_school_term t on t.term_id = c.term_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = c.open_dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into sc_class_course(class_id, course_id, teacher_id, term_id, business_type, teaching_class_code, credits, course_category, open_dept_id, major, campus_name, assessment_type, teaching_language, prerequisite_course, task_type, required_flag, selection_option_name, selection_group_code, selection_group_name, selection_group_limit, course_level_requirement, total_hours, required_weeks, weekly_hours, arranged_hours, student_limit, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{classId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{termId}, #{businessType}, #{teachingClassCode}, #{credits}, #{courseCategory}, #{openDeptId}, #{major}, #{campusName}, #{assessmentType}, #{teachingLanguage}, #{prerequisiteCourse}, #{taskType}, #{requiredFlag}, #{selectionOptionName}, #{selectionGroupCode}, #{selectionGroupName}, #{selectionGroupLimit}, #{courseLevelRequirement}, #{totalHours}, #{requiredWeeks}, #{weeklyHours}, #{arrangedHours}, #{studentLimit}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_class_course class_id = #{classId},course_id = #{courseId},teacher_id = #{teacherId},term_id = #{termId},business_type = #{businessType},teaching_class_code = #{teachingClassCode},credits = #{credits},course_category = #{courseCategory},open_dept_id = #{openDeptId},major = #{major},campus_name = #{campusName},assessment_type = #{assessmentType},teaching_language = #{teachingLanguage},prerequisite_course = #{prerequisiteCourse},task_type = #{taskType},required_flag = #{requiredFlag},selection_option_name = #{selectionOptionName},selection_group_code = #{selectionGroupCode},selection_group_name = #{selectionGroupName},selection_group_limit = #{selectionGroupLimit},course_level_requirement = #{courseLevelRequirement},total_hours = #{totalHours},required_weeks = #{requiredWeeks},weekly_hours = #{weeklyHours},arranged_hours = #{arrangedHours},student_limit = #{studentLimit},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_class_course where id in #{id}
